_meta.description: Known-malicious ROM hashes for Nintendo Switch NSP/XCI files.
_meta.note: Example/placeholder entries below are marked with _EXAMPLE prefix. Replace with verified hashes from your threat intel sources before production use.

sha256._EXAMPLE_trojanized_nsp_payload_dropper: EXAMPLE — replace with real SHA-256 hash of known-bad payload (64 hex chars)
sha256._EXAMPLE_sx_os_installer_trojan: EXAMPLE — replace with real SHA-256 hash of trojanized SX OS installer
sha256._EXAMPLE_nsp_bitcoin_miner: EXAMPLE — replace with real SHA-256 hash of NSP-embedded coin miner

md5._EXAMPLE_known_bad_nca_md5: EXAMPLE — replace with real MD5 hash of known-malicious .nca file (32 hex chars)
